================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 7C AD 9F 36 88
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 10 19 16 21 17 20
v_in[0..5]: 249 248 248 275 303 291

[Bus/Temp]
vbat: 16160
vcc : 3275
temp[0..2]: 210 210 212

[MPPT]
mppt_mode: 1
vboost[0..5]: 17983 18037 17876 17983 17822 17983
power[0..5]: 2 4 3 5 5 5

[DAC]
dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1
dac_val[0..5]: 669 671 667 667 669 669

bootcause : 3054841720
bootcnt   : 1
uptime    : 146
resetcause: 0x4A4A

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 24
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1
device_status[0..7]: 1 3 3 3 4 0 1 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
